description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a sturdy, structured form and a wide open top. The basket is crafted from interlaced natural fibers, likely wicker or rattan, forming a tight, uniform weave with a subtle checkerboard pattern. Two thick, rounded handles are attached to the upper rim on opposite sides, made from the same or similar material, and reinforced for easy carrying. The rim of the basket is accentuated with a darker band, providing both structural support and a visual contrast to the lighter body. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for carrying food, utensils, or other picnic essentials. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments, giving the basket a functional and classic appearance.
description: A rectangular, tightly woven wicker picnic basket with sturdy rounded handles and a contrasting dark rim, open at the top and free of decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, interior space, and one handle clearly visible along the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's length, both handles, and the continuous dark rim around the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open interior and the opposite handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the basket's length, both handles, and the dark rim detail.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, rounded handles made of woven wicker, attached to opposite sides of the rim.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain checkerboard weave with uniform interlacing and no decorative variations.
